org.docgene.model

Class XMLTableCell

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.AbstractStyledElement
      • org.docgene.model.XMLTableCell
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.docgene.model.Alignment, ParagraphElement, ParagraphElementParent, StyledElement
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    XMLTableColumn

    public class XMLTableCell
extends org.docgene.model.AbstractStyledElement
implements ParagraphElementParent, org.docgene.model.Alignment
    Represent a Table Cell.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.Alignment

        CENTER, LEFT, RIGHT

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.StyledElement

        TYPE_NONE

      Return the declaration ID of the element.

      Return the index of the cell in the row.

      Return the cell row span.

      Return true if the cell is aligned.
